name: Cheesy Garlic Bread
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper Preparation Time: 0:25
Mix mayonnaise, cheese, onions and garlic. Spread mixture on bread halves.
If desired, sprinkle with parsley and paprika. Wrap each half in foil.
Refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours or freeze. Unwrap and place on a baking sheet.
Bake at 400°F for 8 to 10 minutes (20 to 25 minutes if frozen) or until puffed
but not brown. Cut into slices.
